title: [Skyship, The Cells]
description: A long rectangular room opens before you.  The longer sides of the metal bulkheads are lined with narrow, recessed sleeping shelves -- not quite wide or tall enough, which would be an uncomfortable fit for a giantkin.  Each shelf is hammered out of the bulkheads and is further strung with coarse white ropes that, together, form small pockets of netting to help hold individuals attempting to rest in them.  In the area's four corners, piles of organic waste attract squadrons of small, flying insects.
